code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut stopped = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if stopped
      i = n
    else
      let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
      match bopt
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          if string.len(token) > 0
            match string.parse_int(token)
            when Some(v)
              if v < 0
                stopped = true
              else
                sum = sum + v
              end
            when None
              stopped = true
            end
            token = ""
          end
        else
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  if not stopped
    if string.len(token) > 0
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        stopped = true
      end
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
